Whatever evil effects have been mentioned here as accruing
from the aspects of planets on the eclipsed disc ehher at the com-
mencement or at the termination of the eclipse, would all be war-
ded off by the benefic aspect of Jupiter, as the blazing fire is put
out by the pouring of water.
[To ward off the evil effects of planets' aspect on the eclipsed
luminary Jupiter should be posited in the 5rh, 7th or 9th house
from the luminary. The metre is gfrtcTTCT.]
If at the time of an eclipse (lunar or solar) there should occur
portents viz. a strong wind, fall of meteors, dust-storm, earthquake
complete darkness, and fall of lightning, the eclipse will recur
after 6, 12, 18, 24, 30 and 36 months respectively.
